commit_scope: Lift boundary repair into a reusable Form protocol and harden BML/kernel failure handling so compiler errors surface before host crashes and sibling-kernel crashes leave source-bearing traces.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/line-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bmf-core.fk form-stdlib/bmf-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bml.fk form-stdlib/bml-source.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk
jq crash-trace payload checks for Go/Rust/TypeScript mode, args, source excerpt, line count, and host stack
observed_results: sovereign-boundary-protocol-band.fk returned 16383 in source and binary execution with 1 ok and 0 divergent
pulse-boundary-repair-band.fk returned 32767 in source and binary execution with 1 ok and 0 divergent
source compiler prelude proof returned 0 with sibling kernels agreeing
Go kernel suite passed: ok form-kernel-go 130.581s
Go, Rust, and TypeScript intentional bad substring probes reported explicit bounds errors and wrote crash trace JSON files under .cache with source text, argv, mode, line count, and host stack
spec quality, generated-index check, blueprint registration check, whitespace check, and wellness passed
local_validation.notes: scan_form_blueprints.py still reports pre-existing name-drift warnings, but unregistered type-99 count is 0 and the command exits cleanly. The intentional crash-probe commands exit nonzero by design; the jq trace payload checks are the passing assertion.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Boundary repair now has a reusable Form source-of-truth protocol with allow, stop, witness, and re_enter choices. Pulse repair maps into that protocol. Malformed BML definition lines now surface source-aware compiler errors before host substring crashes, and uncaught CLI panics in Go, Rust, and TypeScript write source-bearing crash traces for diagnosis.
public_endpoints: form/form-kernel-go CLI and source-compile server path
test_flows: Form source and binary proof bands return 16383 for generic boundary protocol and 32767 for pulse specialization across Go/Rust/TypeScript sibling kernels.
Go server test TestCompileSourceSectionNativeReportsMalformedBMLDef proves malformed BML is returned as inspectable source compiler error instead of crashing the caller.
Go/Rust/TypeScript bad substring probes prove explicit bounds errors and crash trace artifacts with source excerpts and host stacks.

phase_gate.reason: Local and e2e proof passed. CI, PR merge, deploy, and public verification are still pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/sovereign-boundary-protocol.fk defines generic boundary evidence, choices, re-entry checks, and receipt projection.
form/form-stdlib/pulse-boundary-repair.fk maps pulse silence evidence into the generic sovereign boundary protocol.
form/form-stdlib/tests/sovereign-boundary-protocol-band.fk and form/form-stdlib/tests/pulse-boundary-repair-band.fk prove source and binary sibling-kernel agreement.
form/form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk adds source-aware BML definition and let diagnostics through form_error before substring bounds are reached.

form/form-kernel-go/main.go, form/form-kernel-rust/src/main.rs, form/form-kernel-ts/src/kernel.ts, and form/form-kernel-ts/src/main.ts add explicit bounds checks, form_error, and source-bearing crash traces.
form/form-kernel-go/server.go and form/form-kernel-go/server_test.go align BML source-compile preludes and prove malformed BML is inspectable through source_compile_last_error.
specs/pulse-silence-boundary-repair.md and docs/vision-kb/concepts/lc-boundary-repair-protocol.md record the generic protocol and diagnostic contract.
